prose:
Method–provenance summary (frontier orbitals of aniline)

• Property: frontier-orbital energies and HOMO–LUMO gap (eV)
• Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier ‘standard’), density-fitted, run with PySCF 2.x via chemkit
• Geometry provenance: fixed input geometry from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz` – single-point DFT calculation on that structure (notation: DFT//input xyz); no further optimization performed.
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation).
• Charge 0; multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet).
• SCF convergence: converged (9 cycles). No engine warnings were reported.
• Live engine log was streamed to a `frontier_orbitals_*.out` file in the working directory at run time; path was surfaced when the job started. JSON results written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp8ix2lk7o/live.json`.
• Integrity assessment: status "ok"; trustworthy = true (all automatic checks passed).

Key numerical results (gas phase, eV)
  – HOMO energy .............  –5.553772 eV
  – LUMO energy .............  –0.2489544 eV
  – HOMO–LUMO gap ...........   5.3048177 eV  ← headline value

All values are computed; no experimental comparison was requested.
